---
title: "Nauplii_Plastic_Assays"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: installing-packages
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(janitor)
library(colorRamps)
library(drc)
library(ggpubr)
```

```{r}
#| label: loading-data

nauplii_plastic_raw <- read_csv("Data/Nauplii_Plastic_Data.csv")
nauplii_plastic <- clean_names(nauplii_plastic_raw)

```

```{r}
#| label: creating-color-palette

# Count how many unique concentration levels actually exist in your summary
num_colors <- length(unique(nauplii_summary$concentration_mg_m_l))

my_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("#6BB389", "#3276EC"))
my_colors <- my_palette(num_colors)
```

```{r}
#| label: aged_ps_plot

aged_summary <- nauplii_plastic |>
  filter(treatment == "Aged PS") |>
  group_by(concentration_mg_m_l) |>
  summarise(
    mean_mortality = mean(percent_mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_mortality = sd(percent_mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    se_mortality = sd_mortality / sqrt(n)
  )

ggplot(aged_summary, aes(x = factor(concentration_mg_m_l), y = mean_mortality, fill = factor(concentration_mg_m_l))) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_mortality - sd_mortality,
        ymax = mean_mortality + sd_mortality),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Concentration (µg/mL)",
    y = "% Mortality",
    title = "Aged PS % Mortality",
    fill = "Concentration (µg/mL)"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100))
```

```{r}
#| label: pure-ps-plot

pure_summary <- nauplii_plastic |>
  filter(treatment == "Pure PS") |>
  group_by(concentration_mg_m_l) |>
  summarise(
    mean_mortality = mean(percent_mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_mortality = sd(percent_mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    se_mortality = sd_mortality / sqrt(n)
  )

ggplot(pure_summary, aes(x = factor(concentration_mg_m_l), y = mean_mortality, fill = factor(concentration_mg_m_l))) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_mortality - sd_mortality,
        ymax = mean_mortality + sd_mortality),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Concentration (µg/mL)",
    y = "% Mortality",
    title = "Pure PS % Mortality",
    fill = "Concentration (µg/mL)"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100))
```

```{r}
#| label: ps-plot

ps_summary <- nauplii_plastic |>
  filter(treatment == "PS") |>
  group_by(concentration_mg_m_l) |>
  summarise(
    mean_mortality = mean(percent_mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_mortality = sd(percent_mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    se_mortality = sd_mortality / sqrt(n)
  )

ggplot(ps_summary, aes(x = factor(concentration_mg_m_l), y = mean_mortality, fill = factor(concentration_mg_m_l))) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_mortality - sd_mortality,
        ymax = mean_mortality + sd_mortality),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Concentration (µg/mL)",
    y = "% Mortality",
    title = "PS % Mortality",
    fill = "Concentration (µg/mL)"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100))

```

```{r}
#| label: calculate-summaries-and-plot
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 5

# 1. Summarize and clean up the concentration labels
nauplii_summary <- nauplii_plastic |>
  mutate(concentration_clean = factor(round(concentration_mg_m_l, 2))) |> 
  group_by(treatment, concentration_clean) |>
  summarise(
    mean_mortality = mean(percent_mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_mortality = sd(percent_mortality, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 2. Plot with free x-axes per panel
ggplot(nauplii_summary, aes(x = concentration_clean, y = mean_mortality, fill = treatment)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +  
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_mortality - se_mortality, ymax = mean_mortality + se_mortality),
    width = 0.2, color = "black"
  ) +
  # CRITICAL FIX: scales = "free_x" drops the unused empty bars
  facet_wrap(~ treatment, scales = "free_x") + 
  labs(
    x = "Concentration (µg/mL)",
    y = "% Mortality",
    title = "Nauplii Mortality across Plastic Treatments"
  ) +
  # Using your custom palette color palette smoothly per panel
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Aged PS" = "#6BB389", "PS" = "#4D95BC", "Pure PS" = "#3276EC")) + 
  theme_bw() + # Using theme_bw() provides clean borders around each facet panel
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11), # Makes panel headers bold
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank() # Removes vertical gridlines for a cleaner look
  )
```

```{r}

#| label: true-probit-scatterplot
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 5.0

# 1. Apply true Probit and Log10 transformations
nauplii_transformed <- nauplii_plastic |>
  mutate(conc_adjusted = if_else(concentration_mg_m_l == 0, 0.01, concentration_mg_m_l)) |>
  mutate(
    log10_conc = log10(conc_adjusted),
    probit_mortality = qnorm(percent_mortality / 100) + 5
  ) |>
  filter(!is.infinite(probit_mortality) & !is.na(probit_mortality))

# 2. Calculate the transformed summary averages
nauplii_probit_summary <- nauplii_transformed |>
  group_by(treatment, log10_conc) |>
  summarise(
    mean_probit = mean(probit_mortality, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_probit = sd(probit_mortality, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 3. Plot with cross-intersecting internal axes
ggplot(nauplii_probit_summary, aes(x = log10_conc, y = mean_probit, color = treatment)) +
  # FIXED: Draws a solid black baseline across the panels at y = 4 (or change to 3 for absolute bottom)
  geom_hline(yintercept = 4, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  # FIXED: Draws a solid black vertical axis line exactly at x = 0
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  
  geom_point(size = 3) + 
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_probit - se_probit, ymax = mean_probit + se_probit),
    width = 0.05, alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") + 
  
  ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(
    aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")),
    label.x = -1.8, 
    label.y = 6.7,  
    size = 3.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ treatment) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-2, 4), breaks = seq(-2, 4, by = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Log10 Concentration [log10(µg/mL)]",
    y = "Mortality (Probit Units)",
    title = "Classical Probit Dose-Response Analysis"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Aged PS" = "#6BB389", "PS" = "#4D95BC", "Pure PS" = "#3276EC")) + 
  theme_bw() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(3, 7)) + 
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "none",
    # Keeps the outer box outline the clean, light grey of default theme_bw
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey85", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.line = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}

#| label: probit-lc25-calculations

# Fit the 4-parameter log-normal (probit) model split by treatment
probit_model <- drm(
  percent_mortality ~ concentration_mg_m_l, 
  curveid = treatment,
  data = nauplii_plastic, 
  fct = LN.4(names = c("Slope", "Lower Limit", "Upper Limit", "LC25"))
)

# 1. Print out the probit model summary
summary(probit_model)

# 2. Extract the new Probit-calculated LC25 values
cat("\n--- Probit-Calculated LC25 Values per Treatment ---\n")
ED(probit_model, 25)
```
